expectations.text: Explains that heavier loads increase fatigue per set, so stronger lifters naturally need longer recovery
expectations.evidence: Explains ATP-PC recovery, CNS fatigue, lactate clearance, and mechanical tension requirements.

expectations.text: States hypertrophy research findings are mixed
expectations.evidence: States '1 minute versus 3 minutes produced similar hypertrophy gains' and discusses metabolic factors.

expectations.text: For strength, leans toward longer rests especially for strong lifters on compounds
expectations.evidence: States '3-5 minutes of rest is optimal for heavy compound lifts.'
3-5 min for strength, 2-3 min for hypertrophy compounds, 60-90s for isolation.

expectations.text: Mentions supersets as a time-saving strategy
